props.name: images
props.description: Array of image URLs to orbit along the path.

props.name: altPrefix
props.description: Prefix for auto-generated alt attributes.

props.name: shape
props.description: Preset shape: ellipse, circle, square, rectangle, triangle, star, heart, infinity, wave, or custom.

props.name: customPath
props.description: Custom SVG path string (used when shape="custom").

props.name: baseWidth
props.description: Base width for the design coordinate space used for responsive scaling.

props.name: radiusX
props.description: Horizontal radius for ellipse/rectangle shapes.

props.name: radiusY
props.description: Vertical radius for ellipse/rectangle shapes.

props.name: radius
props.description: Radius for circle, square, triangle, star, heart shapes.

props.name: starPoints
props.description: Number of points for star shape.

props.name: starInnerRatio
props.description: Inner radius ratio for star (0-1).

props.name: rotation
props.description: Rotation angle of the entire orbit path in degrees.

props.name: duration
props.description: Duration of one complete orbit in seconds.

props.name: itemSize
props.description: Width/height of each orbiting item in pixels.

props.name: direction
props.description: Animation direction: "normal" or "reverse".

props.name: fill
props.description: Whether to distribute items evenly around the orbit.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class for the container.

props.name: showPath
props.description: Whether to show the orbit path for debugging.

props.name: pathColor
props.description: Stroke color when showPath is true.

props.name: pathWidth
props.description: Stroke width when showPath is true.

props.name: easing
props.description: Animation easing: linear, easeIn, easeOut, easeInOut.

props.name: paused
props.description: Whether the animation is paused.

props.name: centerContent
props.description: Custom content rendered at the center of the orbit.

props.name: responsive
props.description: Enable responsive scaling based on container width.
